steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase with an audience beyond Bolivia directly indicates that the blank describes an action where Sara's work reaches a broader audience outside her home country.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The target meaning is to make her work accessible to a global audience. Share directly expresses this—to present or make available to others.

The other three don't fit: split suggests division, challenge implies confrontation, and examine involves inspection.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
